result.summary: Found 4 issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, primarily related to layout clipping and content truncation on the right side of the viewport.

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are heavily clipped, cutting off game titles (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN MI', 'HYPERC PYRAMIDI', 'DAR WATE THE CURS'). The content is not readable and makes the UI look broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure partial cards shown at the edge are clipped just enough to signal horizontal scrollability (about 20-30% visible), and that the clipped portion does not show incomplete text in a confusing way. Consider adding a scroll affordance indicator or arrow.

issues.description: The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is visibly truncated, with the label cut off mid-word. This makes the tab label unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Use horizontal scrolling for the navigation bar tabs or reduce padding/font-size so all tab labels fit, or ensure truncated labels show a tooltip on hover.

issues.description: The partially visible game cards on the right edge lack any visible scroll indicator (e.g., arrows, dots, or a scrollbar), making it unclear to users that the row is horizontally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add visible scroll arrows or a progress indicator to communicate that the game rows are scrollable carousels.

issues.description: The 'EXCLUSIVE' badge overlays the top-left corner of each game card and partially obscures game artwork, reducing visual quality of the thumbnails.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'EXCLUSIVE' badge to a less intrusive location, such as a bottom ribbon or a smaller corner pip that does not cover key artwork.
